name: E-Commerce Premium Platform
description: A high-fidelity shopping experience with real-time inventory and Stripe payments.
implementation: A production-ready starter template for React Native Expo projects with TypeScript, Redux Toolkit, Expo Router, NativeWind (Tailwind CSS), and comprehensive UI components.

name: AI Content Management Dashboard
description: Admin control center for automated lesson generation using LLMs.
implementation: Developed a multi-step wizard for lesson creation with dynamic AI provider selection (Grok, OpenAI, OpenRouter). Built an advanced analytics dashboard with Recharts for business performance tracking.

name: Social Connect App
description: A real-time social networking application with group chats and stories.
implementation: Built real-time messaging using Socket.io and Firestore listeners. Implemented optimistic UI updates for chat messages and cloud-based image storage via Cloudinary for user profiles and stories.

name: Portfolio Mobile Masterpiece
description: A high-performance personal portfolio mobile application built with React Native and Expo, featuring a premium glassmorphism design and smooth background animations.
implementation: Engineered a global state management system using Redux. Created a seamless experience with background video rendering and smooth shared element transitions across all major pages.
